Wikipedia waxaa dhisa dad sida {{GENDER:|adiga}} oo wada shaqeeya.

{{GENDER:|Wax ka beddelladaada}} waxay caawiyaan hagaajinta Wikipedia iyo horumarinta himilada ah in aqoonta bilaashka ah lala wadaago adduunka. Sii wad adigoo ka bilaabaya tafatirro yar yar oo la soo jeediyay.

{{SITENAME}} waxaa sameeya bulsho ka kooban tafatirayaal sida {{GENDER:|adiga}}. {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaa laga yaabaa in ay kaaga mahadceliyaan wax ka beddel aad sameysay, sidoo kalena {{GENDER:|adiga}} waad uga mahadcelin kartaa dadka kale wax ka beddelladooda.
